Brought to you by Babak

A structured, self-paced curriculum that takes you from “what is AI?” to building production systems and exploring the frontier. Five interactive courses — no logins, no install, no tracking. Just open and learn.

Built for technical professionals who work alongside AI daily. Whether you’re evaluating tools, writing prompts, or architecting systems — start where your experience fits.

5 Interactive Courses · 571 Glossary Terms · 80+ Quizzes & Simulations
